changeSet.author: nour
changeSet.sql:
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS notification_attempts ( id BIGINT GENERATED BY DEFAULT AS IDENTITY PRIMARY KEY, notification_id BIGINT NOT NULL, device_id BIGINT, attempt_number INTEGER NOT NULL DEFAULT 1, status VARCHAR(32) NOT NULL DEFAULT 'PENDING', fcm_message_id VARCHAR(512), error_code VARCHAR(255), error_message TEXT, is_deleted BOOLEAN NOT NULL DEFAULT FALSE, deleted_at TIMESTAMPTZ, deleted_by VARCHAR(255), created_at TIMESTAMPTZ NOT NULL DEFAULT NOW(), updated_at TIMESTAMPTZ NOT NULL DEFAULT NOW(), created_by VARCHAR(255), updated_by VARCHAR(255) );
COMMENT ON TABLE notification_attempts IS 'Audit trail for every FCM push attempt — one row per (notification, device, attempt)'; COMMENT ON COLUMN notification_attempts.status IS 'SUCCESS | FAILED'; COMMENT ON COLUMN notification_attempts.fcm_message_id IS 'Message ID returned by FCM on success'; COMMENT ON COLUMN notification_attempts.error_code IS 'FCM error code on failure (e.g. INVALID_ARGUMENT, UNREGISTERED)';
